content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Implement ATOI/STRSTR". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/string-to-integer-atoi/
constraints: s consists of English letters (both uppercase and lowercase), digits, ' ', '+', '-' and '.'
content.outputFormat: The integer i that can be formed from the string s

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a finite state machine to parse the string and extract the integer value
